summary: Energetic first set with standout Help‑Slip‑Franklin and High Time, drums tight and Phil on fire; recording sounds decent though source unknown
review: The reviewer raves about the first set’s treasure trove of gems, highlighting a smoking Help > Slipknot > Franklin sequence, a fiery Phil Lesh, and the seamless two‑drummer groove of Bill and Mickey. No specific recording flaws are mentioned, so the tape is presumed listenable, but the source type isn’t identified.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises the performance heavily; recording quality not discussed, so rating leans on show quality with modest confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about clarity or mix; reviewer did not note any audio problems.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as packed with gems and a strong, upbeat flow; new energy noted throughout.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil was on fire till the end, praised by reviewer.
band_member_comments.Drums: Billy and Mickey sounded like a single three‑arm drummer – very tight.
